name: The bedroom of Lilith
description:
There is a large sized bed in the center of the room with green curtains.
On the left side of the room is a small table, and on it a lamp. Lilith
was the prisoner of Kerjim, he loved her. She was forced to be locked in
this room until she agreed to bewed him. She has reached immortality and
spends all of eternity in this room.
